covered_sentences: He was very pleased when he understood me or could make me understand him.
It was good to talk to him now.
storyboard_assets.prompt:
Left-right two-panel split, 2:1 ratio, left panel wider. Left panel: camera positioned at mid-height inside the fortified camp, angled slightly right at 30°, looking toward the island-dweller and his companion; near foreground shows the left side of the wooden palisade, mid-ground has the two men facing each other. Right panel: camera at closer range, angled left, framing the companion's face in medium-close shot as he speaks, palisade timber wall visible as background anchor. Panel ratio: left 2/3, right 1/3. Visible-character budget: left panel 2 identifiable figures, right panel 1 identifiable figure.

Left panel: the island-dweller (brown short-hair, goatskin jacket, wide-brim hat, waist knife-sheath, goatskin trousers, leather sandals) stands facing his companion, gesturing with open right hand toward him at waist height, smiling warmly; the companion (black short-curly hair, tawny skin, deep-brown goatskin short-jacket, rough cloth shorts, barefoot) stands opposite, face animated with a wide smile, raising both hands slightly in delight. Right panel: the companion's face and upper chest fill the frame, head tilted slightly, eyes bright and joyful, open mouth mid-speech, left shoulder leans toward the island-dweller (visible only as a partial shoulder silhouette at right edge).

Scene: mature wooden-palisade island camp, daytime warm light; island-dweller stands near the interior ladder leaning against the palisade, ladder top approximately level with his shoulder; companion stands on packed earth, his head height roughly reaching the island-dweller's chin. Left panel background: high earth cliff face with canvas shelter partially visible; right panel background: close timber palisade wall grain.

Light and color: warm afternoon sunlight filtering from the upper left, amber-gold tones; right panel has slightly softer backlit rim on the companion's hair, warm cream-and-brown palette.

Characters: Island-dweller — brown short straight hair, plain white rough shirt under open goatskin short jacket, goatskin wide-brim hat pushed back, waist knife-sheath on right hip, goatskin trousers, leather strap sandals; his head clears the palisade top by about 30 cm. Companion — black short-curly hair, tawny skin, deep-brown goatskin short-jacket, rough cloth shorts, barefoot; his head height is approximately level with the island-dweller's shoulder.

covered_sentences: I took Friday out with me to shoot a goat.
When I fired my gun, Friday trembled and tore open his jacket to see if he was wounded.
He knelt on the ground and said many things I did not understand.
I think he was begging me not to kill him.
storyboard_assets.prompt:
Three-panel horizontal sequence strip, equal-width thirds. Left panel: action/tracking — camera at low angle behind and to the right of the island-dweller, looking along the rifle barrel toward the jungle clearing, island-dweller in mid-ground right, companion slightly behind left; right foreground shows tall palm trunk as partial framing element, background jungle canopy. Middle panel: reaction close — camera positioned at ground level in front of the companion, looking slightly up; companion fills middle and lower frame kneeling, face in near-close shot. Right panel: medium shot — camera at standing eye-level slightly left of center, angled right 20°, framing both men, foreground shows a fallen goat in the grass lower-right. Visible-character budget: left 2, middle 1, right 2.

Left panel: island-dweller (brown short-hair, goatskin wide-brim hat, goatskin jacket, knife-sheath, leather sandals) stands in a slight forward lean aiming a musket toward upper-right at a target out of frame, right shoulder braced against the butt; companion (black curly hair, tawny skin, goatskin jacket, cloth shorts, barefoot) stands just behind-left, body half-turned in alarm, both hands raised slightly. Speed-line marks radiate from the gun barrel tip to upper-right indicating the shot. Middle panel: companion collapses to both knees on jungle floor, left hand tearing open the front of his goatskin jacket, eyes wide in fright, mouth open, head tilted down checking his own chest; thought bubble above head with a simplified bullet-hole sketch and question mark. Right panel: island-dweller steps toward companion, right arm extended downward pointing at the fallen goat on the ground; companion still kneeling, head now turning toward the goat, expression shifting from fear to confusion. Speech bubble from companion: simplified praying-hands sketch (no text).

Scene: tropical island inland jungle, daytime filtered light through canopy; ground covered in leaf litter and grass roots; palm trunks are 4-5x adult height; fallen goat lies on jungle floor, body roughly knee-height of the island-dweller.

Light and color: dappled jungle light, cool green shadow with warm streaks of sunlight; middle panel has slightly harsher contrast to emphasize shock.

Characters: Island-dweller — brown short straight hair, goatskin wide-brim hat, goatskin short-jacket, goatskin trousers, knife-sheath on right hip, leather strap sandals; standing height normal adult male proportion. Companion — black short curly hair, tawny skin, round pleasant face, goatskin short-jacket, rough cloth shorts, barefoot; kneeling height approximately reaches island-dweller's waist.

covered_sentences: I took him by hand and laughed at him, then pointed it to the goat I had shot.
I believe that if I had let him, he would have worshipped me and my gun for days afterwards.

covered_sentences: He would not touch the gun, but he often spoke to it, begging it not to kill him that night, I roasted some meat and gave it to Friday.
He enjoyed it so much that he told me he would never again eat man's flesh.
I was very glad to hear that.

Left-right two-panel split, 2:1 ratio, right panel wider. Left panel: camera positioned inside the camp at low angle, angled up 20° toward the musket leaning against the palisade wall; companion stands to the left side of the musket at arm's length, right hand raised palm-out in a gesture of warding-off/pleading toward the gun, head turned slightly toward it; musket occupies right side of left panel leaning against timber wall, companion is in left portion. Right panel: camera at seated eye-level, angled slightly left 15°, framing island-dweller and companion around a small fire inside the camp; roasted meat on a stick between them, companion holding a piece to his mouth. Visible-character budget: left 1, right 2.

Speech bubble from companion: simplified gun silhouette with a crossed-out figure (simplified: gun sketch + small X mark). Right panel: island-dweller sits cross-legged on the left near a small fire pit, right arm extended holding a roasted meat skewer toward companion; companion sits on the right, accepting the skewer with both hands, eyes closed in enjoyment, a wide smile; small speech bubble from companion: a human figure sketch with a bold X through it ("never again") + a goat sketch beside it.
